name: digiabd
description: Digital As-Built Documentation platform for OFC networks

scripts.build: npm run build -w @digiabd/api && npm run build -w @digiabd/web
scripts.db:up: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio minio-init redpanda
scripts.db:migrate:phase2: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U digiabd -d digiabd -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/002_phase2.sql
scripts.db:migrate:phase3: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U digiabd -d digiabd -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/003_phase3_resilience.sql
scripts.migrate: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U digiabd -d digiabd -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/001_initial_schema.sql
